data.title: Finalize Construction Plans
data.description: Confirm plans permit-ready; resolve design/structural/code issues; issue plans for construction (IFC).

data.title: Permits
data.description: Submit for all required permits; track permit approvals and numbers.

data.title: Material Procurement
data.description: Identify major materials; place orders and confirm lead times; secure materials onsite or offsite per schedule.

data.title: Subcontractor Buy-Out & Scheduling
data.description: Secure all required subcontractors; confirm scope, pricing, and sequencing; establish tentative start windows.

data.title: Power Coordination
data.description: Obtain work order numbers for temporary and permanent power; coordinate meter and service locations.

data.title: Gas Utility Coordination
data.description: Contact gas company; schedule site visit after framing for gas line installation.

data.title: Utility Verification & Tie-Ins
data.description: Call 811 for locates; confirm utilities marked; identify water and sewer tie-in locations.

data.title: Foundation Excavation
data.description: Excavate per plans; verify depth, layout, and bearing conditions.

data.title: Footer Layout & Drainage
data.description: Frame footers; install footer drains; confirm sump pump location and drain routing.

data.title: Footer Pours
data.description: Pour perimeter and interior footers; schedule and pass inspections.

data.title: Basement Gravel Base
data.description: Cover drainage system; bring floor elevation level with footers.

data.title: Foundation Walls
data.description: Install foundation walls; confirm all wall openings prior to install.

data.title: Waterproofing & Below-Grade Insulation
data.description: Waterproof all below-grade walls; install insulation.

data.title: Backfill
data.description: Backfill with #57 gravel.

data.title: Basement Floor Slab
data.description: Confirm drains and bathroom rough-ins; pour slab.

data.title: Framing Readiness
data.description: Framing materials onsite; IFC plans onsite; window and door rough opening info finalized; foundation inspections passed.

data.title: Wood Framing
data.description: Complete all structural framing per plans.

data.title: Windows & Exterior Doors
data.description: Install immediately after framing to seal structure.

data.title: Blocking for Cabinets & Accessories
data.description: Install blocking for cabinets, handrails, grab bars, towel bars, and accessories.

data.title: Garage Opening Temporary Access
data.description: Frame garage opening with plywood; install hinged temporary access door.

data.title: Roofing & Exterior Envelope
data.description: Roofing, siding, fascia, soffits, gutters installed.

data.title: Plumbing Rough-In
data.description: Tubs and shower valves onsite prior to start.

data.title: Exterior Coordination for MEP
data.description: Siding and exterior components required for penetrations onsite.

data.title: Insulation
data.description: Install insulation and pass inspection.

data.title: Drywall
data.description: Floors papered before finishing; in cold months, heat must be operational before drywall begins.

data.title: Garage Door Installation
data.description: Install garage door after drywall finishing.

data.title: Prime & Ceiling Finish
data.description: Prime all walls and ceilings; final coat on ceilings.

data.title: Carpentry & Cabinet Installation
data.description: Cabinets, trim, interior doors, finish panels; exterior doors covered and protected; thresholds protected.

data.title: Countertop Measurement
data.description: Measure after cabinets installed; typical lead time approximately 2 weeks.

data.title: Final Paint
data.description: Two coats on trim; two coats on walls.

data.title: Final Trade Sequencing
data.description: 1) Final electrical 2) Flooring 3) Final HVAC 4) Countertops 5) Final plumbing.

data.title: Countertop Protection
data.description: Countertops covered immediately after install.

data.title: Appliances
data.description: Deliver and install appliances.

data.title: Exterior Close-Out
data.description: Final grading and landscaping; pour driveways, porches, sidewalks.

data.title: Turnover & Close-Out
data.description: All finishes complete; utilities active; exterior work complete; project ready for turnover.
